subcodes.first_line: O Nasír! The All-Knowing Lord proclaimeth: When thou hast My love, thou hast all things. Naught else dost thou need. Strive thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نصیر رب خبیر میفرماید چون حب مرا داری همه داری دگرت هیچ نباید جهد نما که
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
